scripts.release:patch: cd Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && npm version patch && cd ../../ && git push origin master --tags
scripts.release:minor: cd Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && npm version minor && cd ../../ && git push origin master --tags
scripts.release:major: cd Packages/com.tttghost.unity-rigid-alignment && npm version major && cd ../../ && git push master --tags
